See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 25561 => 'Viettel', 25562 => 'Viettel', 25565 => 'tiGO', 25566 => 'SMILE', 25567 => 'tiGO', 25568 => 'Airtel', 25569 => 'Airtel', 25571 => 'tiGO', 25573 => 'Tanzania Telecom', 25574 => 'Vodacom', 25575 => 'Vodacom', 25576 => 'Vodacom', 25577 => 'tiGO', 25578 => 'Airtel', 25579 => 'Vodacom', ];
